## Testing

- [ ] Wrapper installs cleanly (`pip install --user --editable pip/cli` / `cd npm/cli && npm install`)
- [ ] `qiloback --version` resolves the cached binary and exits 0
- [ ] Lint / type-check passes (`ruff`, `mypy`, `eslint` as relevant)
- [ ] Tested manually on Linux
- [ ] Tested manually on macOS
- [ ] Tested manually on Windows
- [ ] No regressions in existing wrapper behaviour (download path, SHA verification, error messages)
